labels.analysis: The MCP Server "ProofX - Content Protection for Creators" provides 6 tools focused on development tools tasks. Core capabilities include analysis and computation, search and retrieval. Key tools: verify_content, verify_hash, get_creator, protect_content, my_account.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: git, code.
labels.custom_label: Data Access - ProofX - Content Protection for Creators

tools.name: verify_content
tools.description: Check if digital content is protected with ProofX. Returns the creator, protection date, signature status, and content details. Use this when a user wants to verify if an image, video, or document has been registered with ProofX.

content_id.description: The ProofX content ID (8-character hex string, e.g. 'a1b2c3d4')

tools.name: verify_hash
tools.description: Verify content authenticity by its SHA-256 hash. Use this when a user has a file and wants to check if it's been registered with ProofX without uploading it. The user should compute the SHA-256 hash of their file first.

hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the file (64-character hex string)

tools.name: get_creator
tools.description: Look up a ProofX creator's profile, including their identity, certificate details, and content count. Use this when a user wants to learn about a content creator registered on ProofX.

creator_id.description: The ProofX creator ID (8-character hex string, e.g. 'c1c15c6c')

tools.name: protect_content
tools.description: Register and protect digital content with ProofX cryptographic signatures. Computes the SHA-256 hash and registers it with ProofX for tamper-proof protection. Use this when a user wants to protect their text, article, poem, script, code, or other content they created. The user must provide their creator_id (get one free at proofx.co.uk).

content_text.description: The text content to protect (article, poem, script, code, lyrics, etc.)

title.description: A title for the content being protected

creator_id.description: ProofX creator ID (8-char hex). If not provided, uses the authenticated session. Get one free at proofx.co.uk

tools.name: my_account
tools.description: Show the current user's ProofX account information including their creator ID, plan, and content count. Use this when a user wants to check their ProofX account status.

tools.name: compute_hash
tools.description: Compute the SHA-256 hash of text content. Useful for creating a fingerprint of content for verification purposes.
